hero.title: Multilingual base prepared from the audited live content
hero.body: The confirmed material currently supports a new website structure with three main services, public contact details and pending legal review.

servicesOverview.title: Three main services confirmed
servicesOverview.body: The current audit confirms three service lines with their own pages on the existing website.

whyChooseUs.title: What is confirmed before the final redesign
whyChooseUs.body: The new editorial base prioritizes audited data and removes promises that have not yet been validated.
items: Address, mobile, phone/fax and opening hours detected on the current site.
Exact geographic coverage still pending definition.

process.title: How the current site describes the service flow
process.body: The current website repeats a pattern of contact, advice, intervention and later support.
items: Contact request through form, phone, email or WhatsApp.
Advice for home or business depending on the service.
After-sales support mentioned on the current website.

contactCta.title: Partially confirmed contact data
contactCta.body: Address, phones, opening hours and the primary email are confirmed.

faqs.title: Questions already published on the current site
faqs.body: These answers rely on audited content and can be revised once final editorial validation exists.
items: They work on residential and commercial projects.
A quote can be requested by form, phone or email.
The current website mentions a 24 to 48 business hour response time.
